steps.title: Track ownership and number
steps.content: The sentence refers back to Thomas Paine as one author, so the noun showing ownership must be singular possessive. It also refers to multiple political works, so the second noun should be plural.

steps.title: Use singular possessive form
steps.content: The form author's political writings correctly shows that the writings belong to one author and that there are multiple writings. A lacks possession, C incorrectly makes writings singular possessive, and D makes both nouns plural possessive. The answer is B.
